subcodes.first_line: O esteemed one! Whensoever the realm of existence is summoned by God's consummate wisdom and time issueth its decisive decree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب محترم هر وقت عالم وجود را بحکمت بالغه الهیه اقتضاای و زمانرا حکم صارم
subcodes.subjects: @relationship between government and people, @parliaments; constitutional government, @status of kings; future of monarchy, @acting according to the exigencies of the day; pragmatism
